data.raceName: PERFECT STING AT MACCA LODGE F&M PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. RED HOT FILLY PEPPER is a three-year-old filly from the Brett Gray stable on debut. Has the benefit of a good draw. Trial winner who looks above average. Has the right credentials to play a major role. 6. LUXMI finished fourth last start, beaten 6 metres at Ascot Park Raceway over 1700m. Capable of playing a major role so has to be respected. 4. WHY NOT ME is worth another chance after a last-start ninth over 2200m at Gore Raceway four weeks ago. 7. AMERICANA ELITE is ready to improve after debuting with a modest tenth last time out over 1609m at this track.","runners":[1,6,4,7],"exclusive":true}
